prompt: Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department

inputData.question: Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department"},"startedAt":1771804491431,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count courses per credit value grouped by department, compute each credit-bin's share of that department's courses, and order by department code then credit value. Verified tables and columns (public.courses: credits, department_id; public.departments: id, code, name).","sql":"WITH dept_credit_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    c.credits AS credits,
    COUNT(*) AS course_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, c.credits
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  credits,
  course_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * course_count::numeric / SUM(course_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id), 2) AS percent_of_department
FROM dept_credit_counts
ORDER BY department_code, credits;","assumptions":["Only departments that have at least one course are shown (inner JOIN).","credits is an integer column on public.courses representing course credit value.","department_id on courses references departments.id as discovered in the schema."]},"endedAt":1771804511534},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH dept_credit_counts AS (

  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, c.credits
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  credits,
  course_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * course_count::numeric / SUM(course_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id), 2) AS percent_of_department
FROM dept_credit_counts
ORDER BY department_code, credits;"},"startedAt":1771804511540,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH dept_credit_counts AS (

)
SELECT

  credits,
  course_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * course_count::numeric / SUM(course_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id), 2) AS percent_of_department
FROM dept_credit_counts
ORDER BY department_code, data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Distribution of course credit values by department

resultRaw.sql:
WITH dept_credit_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    c.credits AS credits,
    COUNT(*) AS course_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, c.credits
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  credits,
  course_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * course_count::numeric / SUM(course_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id), 2) AS percent_of_department
FROM dept_credit_counts
ORDER BY department_code, credits;

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Distribution of course credit values by department

result.sql:
WITH dept_credit_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.code AS department_code,
    d.name AS department_name,
    c.credits AS credits,
    COUNT(*) AS course_count
  FROM public.departments d
  JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name, c.credits
)
SELECT
  department_id,
  department_code,
  department_name,
  credits,
  course_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * course_count::numeric / SUM(course_count) OVER (PARTITION BY department_id), 2) AS percent_of_department
FROM dept_credit_counts
ORDER BY department_code, credits;
